data.title: Quiddity Engineering expands with new office in Waco, Texas - showcasing steady growth within the state.
data.description: Quiddity Engineering, a prominent design firm ranked among the Engineering News-Record Top 500, recently inaugurated a new office in Waco, Texas on January 26, 2026. This expansion signifies the company's dedication to incremental and sustainable progress, further solidifying its footprint in the state.

data.title: Trump plans to hike tariffs to 25% on South Korean goods, including cars, due to slow trade deal ratification.
data.description: The President of the United States has issued a warning to South Korea regarding a potential tariff hike on its exports, particularly cars, due to frustrations over the country's delayed approval of a trade agreement. President Trump's threat aims to push South Korea to expedite the ratification process. The tariff increase could significantly impact South Korean exports and trade relations between the two countries.

SOUTH KOREA FINANCE MINISTRY SAYS IT WILL HOLD TALKS WITH THE U.S. ON PARLIAMENTARY APPROVAL PROCESS FOR U.S.-BOUND INVESTMENT.

data.title: Bristow Group closes $500M notes offering and extends ABL facility.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Bristow Group Inc. completed a private offering of $500 million in 6.750% senior secured notes due 2033. The offering involved the issuance of the notes.

data.title: Real-world data shows 84% survival of children with SR-aGvHD after 28 days of Ryoncil® treatment. Mesoblast Limited provided an update on the use of Ryoncil® since its commercial availability in March 2025, approved for children 2 months and older with SR-aGvHD. Ryoncil® is the first MSC product approved by the FDA for any indication.
data.description: In New York on Jan. 26, 2026, Mesoblast Limited (Nasdaq:MESO; ASX:MSB), a global leader in allogeneic cellular medicines for inflammatory diseases, shared an update on the use of Ryoncil ® (remestemcel-L-rknd). The product has been commercially available since March 2025 for the approved label in children aged 2 months and older who have steroid-refractory acute graft-versus-host disease (SR-aGvHD). Notably, Ryoncil ® is the first mesenchymal stromal cell (MSC) product to receive approval from the U.S. Food & Drug Administration (FDA) for any indication.

data.title: Tricia A. Asaro of Greenberg Traurig recognized on City & State's '2026 Trailblazers in Healthcare' list.
data.description: Albany, New York, January 26, 2026 - Tricia A. Asaro, a Shareholder at Greenberg Traurig, LLP, has been honored on City & State's "2026 Trailblazers in Healthcare" roster. As an expert in transactions related to managed care organizations, Asaro has carved a niche for herself as a leading figure in this field. City & State highlights her significant contributions to the healthcare sector.

data.title: Northeast Bank declared $20.7M net income, $2.47/share for Q4 2025; $43.3M net income, $5.14/share for H1 2025.
data.description: In Portland, Maine, as of January 26, 2026, Northeast Bank (NASDAQ: NBN), headquartered in Maine, revealed a net income of $20.7 million, equaling $2.47 per diluted common share, in the final quarter of 2025. This marks a decrease from the previous year's final quarter, when net income was $22.4 million, or $2.74 per diluted common share, by December 31, 2024. For the six months leading up to December 31, 2025, the bank reported a net income of $43.3 million, translating to $5.14 per diluted common share. This is a rise from the $39.5 million net income, or $4.85 per diluted common share, reported in the same six-month period in 2024.

data.title: TE Connectivity prices $750 million senior notes offerings; subsidiary prices $200 million of 4.500% senior notes.
data.description: In Galway, Ireland, on January 26, 2026, TE Connectivity plc (NYSE: TEL) disclosed that its indirect wholly-owned subsidiary, Tyco Electronics Group S.A. ("TEGSA"), has set the offering price for $200 million aggregate principal amount of its 4.500% senior notes...

data.title: Five Star Bancorp reports net income of $17.6M for Q4 2025 (+$1.3M from Q3), $61.6M for 2025 (+$15.9M from 2024).
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in Rancho Cordova, California, Five Star Bancorp (Nasdaq: FSBC), a company operating through its wholly owned banking subsidiary Five Star Bank, announced a net income of $17.6 million for the three months ending on December 31, 2025. This is an increase from $16.3 million in the previous quarter ending on September 30, 2025, and a substantial rise from $13.3 million in the same period of 2024. For the entire year of 2025, the net income amounted to $61.6 million, contrasting with $45.7 million in 2024.

data.title: Provident Financial Services, Inc. to start 10th stock repurchase program after completing current one with 814,247 shares left.
data.description: Iselin, N.J. - On January 26, 2026, Provident Financial Services, Inc. disclosed the initiation of its tenth stock repurchase program after receiving approval from the Board of Directors. The program will commence once the current stock repurchase initiative concludes, leaving 814,247 shares still eligible for repurchase.

data.title: Crest Holdings Group LLC in Atlanta announces strategic growth focus and business development vision.
data.description: Atlanta-based Crest Holdings Group LLC, a consulting and holding firm, unveiled its commitment to long-term business growth and strategic expansion. The company, headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, highlighted its focus on organizational expansion and growth initiatives moving forward. Founded by an entrepreneur, Crest Holdings Group LLC has set its sights on further developing its business, with a strong emphasis on long-term strategy and growth.

data.title: FCPT buys McAlister's Deli property in Michigan for $2.3 million; newly constructed, franchisee-operated under long-term net lease.
data.description: Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE: FCPT), a real estate investment trust focusing on high-quality net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has successfully acquired a newly constructed McAlister's Deli property in Michigan for $2.3 million. The property is situated in a thriving retail area and is operated by a franchisee under a long-term net lease agreement. This acquisition strengthens FCPT's portfolio and investment strategy.

data.title: OLEHENRIKSEN introduces Sweet Macaron to Pout Preserve Peptide Lip Treatment lineup for enhanced lip care.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 26, 2026, OLEHENRIKSEN, a renowned Scandinavian skincare brand, introduced an expansion to its popular Pout Preserve Peptide Lip Treatment line. The new addition, Sweet Macaron, offers a delicious flavor while maintaining the line's reputation for providing effective lip plumping and hydration. This move is aimed at further strengthening the brand's presence in the market and meeting the rising demand for innovative lip care products.

data.title: CEO of Anthropic warns AI outpacing society's control as regulation lags behind, company advances. CEO: Dario Amodei.
data.description: Dario Amodei, the CEO of Anthropic, has raised concerns about increasing AI risks due to the lagging regulation in the face of rapid advancements. Amidst this scenario, his company continues to forge ahead with its initiatives.

data.title: Whirlpool highlights portfolio-wide innovation at KBIS 2026, showcasing breakthrough tech from four brands. Based in Benton Harbor, Mich.
data.description: A leading global appliance company, Whirlpool Corporation from Benton Harbor, Michigan, will be unveiling its latest technological advancements at the Kitchen & Bath Industry Show (KBIS) 2026. The company aims to provide immersive, hands-on experiences featuring cutting-edge technology from four renowned brands. The event is scheduled for January 26, 2026, and will witness the unveiling of breakthrough innovations to a wide audience. Stay tuned for updates on this exciting showcase of innovation and technology.
